title: Mediterranean Mediterranean Parmesan Cheese Roast
description: Roasted, bouncy, and delicious, this Mediterranean-inspired dish is perfect for brunch. The combination of flavors and textures makes for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt, pepper, and your favorite herbs.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken breast until browned on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the chicken to a baking sheet and set aside.
Add the sliced eggplant, red bell pepper, zucchini, and red onion to the skillet and cook until they start to soften, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Transfer the vegetables to the baking sheet with the chicken.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Sprinkle the crumbled feta cheese and grated Parmesan cheese over the top of the chicken and vegetables.
Return to the oven and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve hot.
